name: tmp_bandit_live_world_owned_site2_offbase_field_probe_2026-04-24
description: Disposable proof footing: start from the claimed nearby-owned-site save, then move the player just south of the bandit camp on non-road/non-Basecamp field footing so the shakedown surface must use off-base carried/current-vehicle reach instead of Basecamp inventory reach.
